name: retzef
description: רצף — a quiet menu-bar memory for people who switch a lot. Passively remembers what you were doing on each thread and gives you a clean glance back, plus a daily focus read. Local-only, no screenshots.
author: Zeev-L

extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Retzef reads the active browser tab title/URL to remember what you were working on.
extendInfo.NSAccessibilityUsageDescription: Retzef reads the frontmost window title to remember your work threads.
